examples.title: Algorithm: Choose Collection Type
examples.description: Pseudocode to select collection type based on requirements
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ChooseCollection
INPUT: requirements (ordering, duplicates, performance)
OUTPUT: collection type

BEGIN
 IF ordering required THEN
 RETURN List
 ELSE IF uniqueness required THEN
 RETURN Set
 ELSE IF key-value pairs THEN
 RETURN Map
 ELSE IF FIFO processing THEN
 RETURN Queue
 END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step logic to choose the correct collection type
